body.title: Overview
body.content:
This is provides a basic overview of Overlayer fundamentals.
It provides only the basics of how to get started with Overlayer, including concepts.

body.title: Introduction
body.content:
# Welcome to Overlayer!
This mod is **complex** at first, but later on, it has the *great power* of your customization. On the left side of this wiki viewer, you'll find a UI that lists the **table of contents** and documents. You can also *search* for the content you need.
